The Most Important Part Of
Getting An Offer To Convert
On Cold Traffic
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 109 --

A little backstory...
- 	Over the last year, I’ve seen inside 167+ different funnels (I actually counted
them when putting this presentation together)
- 	These 167 funnels were from a variety of niches - health, make money,
financial, survival, biz opp, dating, real estate, golf, guns, non profits, politics
and more…
- 	After looking inside all of these funnels, I started to notice that some offers
simply wouldn’t convert on cold traffic no matter how good the copy was or
how dialed-in the upsells were.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 2 of 109 --

Why would an offer with good copy,
good upsells and the right price still not
work on cold traffic?
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

The product is simply not
appealing enough

-- 43 of 109 --

Here’s what I do...
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 44 of 109 --

Start with a wide variety of potential offers and
survey your list to see what they want
(yes it’s this simple)
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 45 of 109 --

Do this on Survey Monkey
It’s a simple “Yes/No” survey about whether they
would buy the product or not
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 46 of 109 --

I learned this method from Brian Kurtz
who used it to pump-out winner after
winner when he was at Bottom Line
Publications.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 47 of 109 --

Let’s do a live example of this...
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 48 of 109 --

Premise: I’m going to create a product about
marketing to sell to my email list later this year.
It will be relatively inexpensive ($99).
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 49 of 109 --

Let me know if you would buy or not buy the
product I’m proposing
Reminder 	- 	all of these products I’m going to
show you would be $99 each
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 50 of 109 --

Note: be honest about whether you would buy it.
Don’t just say “yes” cause other people are
saying yes
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 61 of 109 --

I surveyed the list on 7 product ideas I had...
- 	Food Cures book - Specific “food prescriptions” to fight diseases
- 	Drug Alternatives - Natural alternatives to prescription drugs.
- 	Curing Diabetes - Naturally cure your type 2 diabetes with food
- 	Senior Home workout DVD - easy stretches and exercises for more mobility
- 	Better Sex In Your 60’s and beyond
- 	30 Day High Blood Pressure Cure - natural plan to cure high blood pressure
- 	Herbal Healing Book - herbs that heal disease
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 84 of 109 --

You can do this in any niche 	- 	simply come up
with a list of appealing products and survey your

www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 85 of 109 --

How do you come up with highly
appealing products?
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 86 of 109 --

1. 	It has to be something they WANT (not need)
2. 	Does it tap into a trend?
3. 	It should be similar to something that sells
well already (but has a unique twist to it)
4. 	Does it increase their status?
5. 	How done-for-them is it?
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 87 of 109 --

Does it tap into a trend?
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 88 of 109 --

- 	Paleo was HOT four years ago. Now it’s harder to sell.
Keto offers are selling like crazy because its a trend.
- 	Bitcoin offers sold like crazy in the original Bitcoin run-up.
Everyone and their brother was talking about Bitcoin. Now
Bitcoin is tougher to sell.
- 	In the IM niche, everything is about Facebook right now 	-
would be a lot harder to sell a Youtube course
- 	In health, offers with stem cells or NAD are doing well
because those topics are on trend
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 89 of 109 --

Is it similar to something that sells well already
(with a unique twist)
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 90 of 109 --

- 	Putting out a basic “keto product” is not exciting. You
need a twist on it...
- 	Keto fast food recipes
- 	Keto for carb lovers
- 	Keto breads
- 	Keto for women over 40
- 	Keto for busy people (how to eat keto at fast food
restaurants)
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 91 of 109 --

- 	Fishing lure
- 	Unique twist
- 	“Genetic response”
- 	it mimics a dying minnow
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 92 of 109 --

Does the product
increase their status?
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 93 of 109 --

Why would someone buy this shirt?
- 	They want people to THINK they are
a patriotic, God-loving American
- 	They want recognition
- 	In their mind, it increases their status
(makes them feel better than other
people)
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 94 of 109 --

Why would someone buy this product?
- 	They want to look and feel younger
- 	They want other people to notice/comment
that they look younger (i.e. be the envy of
their friends)
- 	Looking younger increases status, gets them
recognition
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 95 of 109 --

Why would someone buy this course?
- 	They want to get out of their
current job, be on their own, make
their own money
- 	Prove everyone around them
wrong
- 	Get rich = get approval (higher
status)
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

If you remember one thing from this

Highly appealing offers scale on cold traffic
Mediocre offers do not scale on cold traffic
